interpretation.claim_level: pre-training source-contract audit only; current trainable state-latent data is blocked
interpretation.why_this_explains_bad_videos: The current downstream VAE/diffusion path learns from 160-D policy observations and windows that can include done/reset discontinuities, while the paper diffusion model is defined over continuous accepted hybrid state-latent trajectories. This mismatch can collapse the learned control chain toward a weak forward-leaning posture even when a reference pose replay looks reasonable.

observed_dataset.paper_contract_state_source: policy_obs in local paper-contract best-teacher rollout shards
observed_dataset.stage1_multisource_state_source: policy_obs in local multi-source best-teacher rollout shards

permission.allowed_next_step: modify teacher rollout collection to save raw root/body world state, then rebuild continuous accepted 99-D hybrid-state windows

rows.contract: Paper state-latent source contract is readable
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Paper S3 requires hybrid character-yaw-centric state, OU perturbation collection, 5s rejection, and symmetry augmentation.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Restore/read paper source before claiming formula-level data alignment.

rows.contract: Reusable hybrid state schema gate is available
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Previous gate must define 99-D hybrid state and 163-D projected state.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Run/fix hybrid schema audit before building a trainable state-latent dataset.

rows.contract: Reusable raw rollout to paper hybrid-state builder is implemented and tested
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Training dataset builders must call a single tested helper that converts contiguous raw root/body simulator state into the paper 99-D yaw-centric hybrid state.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Implement/test raw rollout -> 99-D hybrid-state construction before rebuilding teacher rollout state-latent datasets.

rows.contract: Current paper-contract state-latent dataset is not 160-D policy observation
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Expected 99-D hybrid state or 163-D projected state; token dim should be 131 or 195 with 32-D latent.
rows.observed_in_current_project: state_source='policy_obs in local paper-contract best-teacher rollout shards', obs_dim=160, token_dim=192
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Rebuild state-latent shards from raw simulator/root/body state, not from Stage-1 policy_obs.

rows.contract: Paper-contract state-latent dataset status is consistent with its state source
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: A dataset JSON may only use an ok paper-contract status when state_source is raw hybrid/projected state and dims match the paper contract.
rows.observed_in_current_project: status='ok_official_importer_export_paper_contract_teacher_rollout_state_latent_dataset', state_source='policy_obs in local paper-contract best-teacher rollout shards', obs_dim=160, token_dim=192
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Regenerate or patch the wrapper so policy_obs-derived state-latent artifacts are marked blocked, never ok.

rows.contract: Teacher rollout collector source records fields needed for future paper hybrid-state shards
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Collector code should save root pose/twist and target-body world positions/velocities so future shards can build 99-D hybrid states.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Patch the teacher rollout collector before recollecting rollout shards.

rows.contract: Teacher rollout shards contain raw world-state fields required to construct paper hybrid state
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Rollout shards must contain root pose/twist and target-body world positions/velocities.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Modify teacher rollout collection to save root/body world states and velocities before building state-latent data.

rows.contract: Paper-contract state-latent builder path requires raw hybrid state instead of policy_obs
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: The paper-contract wrapper must force raw rollout -> hybrid/projected state and must not override state_source to policy_obs. A legacy resource-adjusted path may remain only if clearly labeled.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Replace policy_obs encoding path with explicit hybrid-state construction and record schema version.

rows.contract: Window index excludes done/reset discontinuities and implements paper 5s rejection
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Samples should be accepted only when the robot remains stable for the 5s verification horizon; windows must not cross done/reset discontinuities.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Implement accepted-episode filtering and reject/omit all windows crossing dones/resets before diffusion training.

rows.contract: OU-noise collection and symmetry augmentation are recorded in the trainable dataset protocol
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Paper uses OU action perturbations for DAgger-like rollout data and sagittal symmetry augmentation for VAE/diffusion.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Add explicit OU perturbation metadata and symmetry augmentation outputs for train/val/test splits.

rows.contract: Diffusion training scripts consume paper hybrid/projected state, not policy_obs
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Denoiser input should be state-latent tokens built from hybrid/projected state and VAE latent.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Gate full diffusion training until scripts read corrected state-latent arrays instead of source_shard['policy_obs'].
